title: EntityPearl
description: Mod that makes it so the entity you're currently riding teleports with you when you enderpearl.
body: This mod enhances Ender Pearl teleportation by allowing you to bring along any entity you are currently controlling. Normally, when you travel with pets, mounts, or vehicles, you’re forced to leave them behind or use complicated methods to move them across long distances. With this mod, that hassle disappears. When you throw an Ender Pearl while riding or steering an entity—such as a horse, a donkey, a boat, a minecart, or even certain modded mounts—that entity will teleport with you as soon as the pearl lands. Instead of teleporting alone and abandoning your companion, both you and the entity arrive together at the same destination. --- [](https://discord.com/invite/jpFJG8dujR) [](https://ko-fi.com/kasetoatz) [](https://paypal.me/KaasToast) Looking for a fun place to play Minecraft and try out some of my mods? Come hang out on the El Basurero SMP! - **IP:** `play.ebsmp.com` - **Recommended Version:** 26.1.2 (other versions work too!) - **Bedrock Edition:** Supported - **Bonus:** Test out most of my server-side mods live in-game! For more info check the [docs](https://ebsmp.com/)!
